purpose: Declare the first accepted epoch for the bounded constitutional object chain and prevent projections from inferring current state from repo, host, package, or README freshness.
dominance_rule: This accepted epoch is the active ORBISTIUM epoch for the bounded chain. Projections may cite it but may not advance, rewind, rename, replace, or expand it.
refusal_rule: If an active claim depends on an epoch but the accepted epoch object is absent, stale, ambiguous, or contradicted by projection text, ADMISSORIUM and SDKs must refuse rather than infer epoch state.
forbidden_reads: Git commit time presented as accepted epoch
README freshness presented as accepted epoch
host deployment freshness presented as accepted epoch
package release date presented as accepted epoch
status page freshness presented as accepted epoch
ADMISSORIUM report presented as accepted epoch
